problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors may resolve What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
